Rows / columns = dimensions · intensity = count

Created vs resolved Line / area

Full-width trend — typical “hero” chart for time series from record data.

Open this file in a browser (double-click or File → Open). This is a visual aid for layout and density; production dashboards use @bmc-ux/adapt-charts and configurable view components bound to record definitions or APIs.
